agreements: All analyses preserve local-only and read-only behavior.
disagreements: The view-model naming alone is insufficient without integration tests.
unsupportedAssumptions: The preview prop boundary will remain unchanged without enforcement.
missedRisks: A create-trip callback could accidentally prefill or persist Demo data.
questions: Which integration test proves the create CTA opens only a blank modal?
revisedRecommendation: Keep the boundary and require both model identity and App integration tests.
